$comment: C99 <complex.h> (В§7.3) вЂ” FC17.9(f) (D-CSUBSET-COMPLEX). The `_Complex` type-specifier is a c-subset.lang.json KEYWORD (no header needed); this header ships only the MACRO surface. `complex`в†’`_Complex` (C11 7.3.1). `I`/`_Complex_I`в†’`__builtin_complex(0.0, 1.0)` вЂ” the imaginary unit built from the always-injected `__builtin_complex(re, im)` complex-constructing builtin (the GCC/Clang builtin; c-subset.lang.json builtinFunctions, reserved `__builtin_` namespace). `creal`/`cimag`/`conj`(z) are function-like macros routing to the matching `__builtin_creal`/`__builtin_cimag`/`__builtin_conj` intrinsics (cycle-1 F64-monomorph вЂ” D-CSUBSET-COMPLEX-MONOMORPH-F64; crealf/creall/cimagf/вЂ¦ + the transcendental math cabs/carg/cexp/clog/csqrt/csin/вЂ¦ are the named deferral D-CSUBSET-COMPLEX-TRANSCENDENTAL; the float/long-double accessors crealf/creall/cimagf/вЂ¦ are D-CSUBSET-COMPLEX-MONOMORPH-F64). No `library`/`symbols` (all lowering is compiler-intrinsic, no linkable symbol), so available on every object format. `imaginary`/`_Imaginary_I` are NOT shipped: pure-imaginary types are unsupported (C99 optional Annex G вЂ” `_Imaginary` fails loud; D-CSUBSET-IMAGINARY-TYPE).
